description: The AvatarVoiceRangeVisualizer component is used to generate and maintain the whisper bubble that appears when a user enables their whisper bubble mode.

fields.VolumeSource: A float representing audio change. Usually the ``Volume`` field from a Component:VolumeMeter
fields.AudioOutput: An audio output to read info from to make the bubble size
fields.WhisperColorMin: The color the bubble should glow at when the user is not speaking during whisper mode.
fields.WhisperColorMax: The color the bubble should glow at when the user is speaking at max volume during whisper mode.
fields.WhisperColorRecordingMessage: The color the bubble should be when the user is recording a message.
fields.VisualRoot: The root slot of the visual generated for this component to function
fields._activeUser: The user controlling and updating this component's logic.
fields._visualSize: The field to use when driving the size of this visual to match the range of the user's whisper mode. Uses ``AudioOutput``'s range for the source of the data.
fields._visualColor: The field to drive to a color in an inclusive range of ``WhisperColorMin`` and ``WhisperColorMax`` depending on volume output.
